paragraphs.greek: Ο Αλεξ βγαίνει από το μετρό. Ένας άντρας λέει: «Γεια σου!»
paragraphs.english: Alex exits the metro. A man says: "Hello!"
paragraphs.swedish: Alex går ut från tunnelbanan. En man säger: "Hej!"
paragraphs.speakerNote: Alex hears his first Greek greeting on the street

paragraphs.greek: Ο Αλεξ απαντάει: «Γεια σου! Ευχαριστώ!» Ο άντρας χαμογελάει: «Παρακαλώ!»
paragraphs.english: Alex replies: "Hello! Thank you!" The man smiles: "You're welcome!"
paragraphs.speakerNote: Alex uses his first real Greek words in conversation

explanation.en: These four words will get you through almost any situation! Γεια (ya) is the casual 'hi/bye'. Γεια σου (ya su) is 'hello/goodbye' to one person. Ευχαριστώ (ef-ha-ri-STO) is 'thank you'. Παρακαλώ (pa-ra-ka-LO) means both 'please' and 'you're welcome'.
explanation.sv: Dessa fyra ord hjälper dig i nästan alla situationer! Γεια (ya) är det avslappnade 'hej/hejdå'. Γεια σου (ya su) är 'hej/hejdå' till en person. Ευχαριστώ (ef-ha-ri-STO) är 'tack'. Παρακαλώ (pa-ra-ka-LO) betyder både 'snälla' och 'varsågod'.

label.en: Has two meanings depending on context
label.sv: Har två betydelser beroende på sammanhang

grammarSpotlight.swedishParallel: Greek παρακαλώ works like Swedish 'varsågod' — it can mean both 'please' (when asking) and 'you're welcome' (when responding to thanks). Two jobs, one word!

prompt.en: How do you say 'hello' to one person in Greek?
prompt.sv: Hur säger man 'hej' till en person på grekiska?

prompt.en: How do you say 'thank you' in Greek?
How do you say 'please' or 'you're welcome' in Greek?
prompt.sv: Hur säger man 'snälla' eller 'varsågod' på grekiska?

hint.en: One word for both 'please' and 'you're welcome'.
Γεια σου = Hello, Ευχαριστώ = Thank you, πολύ = very much
hint.sv: Γεια σου = Hej, Ευχαριστώ = Tack, πολύ = så mycket

prompt.en: Someone says 'Ευχαριστώ!' to you. How do you respond?
prompt.sv: Någon säger 'Ευχαριστώ!' till dig. Hur svarar du?

prompt.en: Review: What does this word mean?

hint.en: Something you open to enter a room.
hint.sv: Något du öppnar för att gå in i ett rum.

prompt.en: Review: What sound does the Greek letter Β make?
prompt.sv: Repetition: Vilket ljud gör den grekiska bokstaven Β?

hint.en: It looks like B but sounds like...
hint.sv: Det ser ut som B men låter som...
